title: GoalOS Universal Outcome Autopilot Studio

missionTypes.name: AI Research & Strategy Signoff
missionTypes.summary: Define done, check evidence, review claims, and issue a Mission Receipt.

missionTypes.name: Software / Automation Signoff
missionTypes.summary: Turn code, traces, tests, screenshots, and constraints into acceptance criteria.

missionTypes.name: DAO Grant / Treasury Milestone
missionTypes.summary: Require proof package, reviewer decision, and settlement readiness before value moves.

missionTypes.name: 48-Contract Rail Explorer
missionTypes.summary: Explain which verified Mainnet contracts support each Signoff stage.

missionTypes.name: Proof Before Settlement
missionTypes.summary: Move from proof-to-acceptance to proof-to-payment with reviewer accountability.

missionTypes.name: Mission 001 Replay / Reproducibility
missionTypes.summary: Open the benchmark-ready reproducibility packet and proof bundle.

missionTypes.name: RSI Governance / Move-37 Dossier
missionTypes.summary: Convert exploratory invention into deterministic gates, replay, stress tests, and dossier packaging.

missionTypes.name: ASI Boundary / Mission Simulator
missionTypes.summary: Inspect the Loop → RSI → ASI governance path with rollback, council review, and receipt.

missionTypes.name: GoalOS Site Navigation
missionTypes.summary: Start with the full command center and let GoalOS route you.

Signoff Basic.customer: No wallet. Define the brief, check evidence, obtain approval, issue a receipt.
Signoff Basic.boundary: Protocol-compatible off-chain receipt; no chain transaction required.

Signoff Verified.customer: Anchor hashes, issue proof cards and credentials, keep customer flow simple.
Signoff Verified.boundary: Public verification rails only after activation gates; no public fund custody by default.

Signoff Secured.customer: Bonded review, challenge window, reputation, falsification and appeal path.
Signoff Secured.boundary: Requires remediation, audit, authorization, and appropriate operational controls.

Signoff & Settle.customer: Release reward only after accepted proof and governed review.
Signoff & Settle.boundary: No public Mainnet settlement until production activation and user-fund authorization.

roles.label: First-time visitor
roles.promise: Explain GoalOS and choose the best next page.

roles.label: AI consultant / agency
roles.promise: Turn client work into a signoff-ready mission.

roles.label: Client reviewer
roles.promise: Check whether work is ready to accept.

roles.label: DAO / treasury
roles.promise: Gate grants, milestones, and payment by proof.

roles.label: Enterprise / board
roles.promise: Create a defensible acceptance record and review path.

roles.label: Protocol operator
roles.promise: Map Signoff tiers to the 48 Mainnet rails.

roles.label: RSI / ASI governance
roles.promise: Convert exploration into gated dossiers and governed promotion.

examplePrompts: I delivered an AI research report to a client and need to prove it is ready to accept.
We need to release a DAO grant milestone only if the evidence package passes review.
Show me which 48 Mainnet contracts support Signoff Verified and Signoff & Settle.
Govern a Move-37 breakthrough candidate with replay, stress tests, and a dossier.
I am new. Explain where to start and open the right page.

contracts.name: CommercializationPerformanceVault
contracts.summary: Receives and tracks commercialization-performance capital as a vault rail.

contracts.name: ProofRewardsVault
contracts.summary: Holds reward capital for proof work, reviewers, and accepted work flows.

contracts.name: LiquidityVault
contracts.summary: Separates liquidity support from proof, security, and community vaults.

contracts.name: SecurityVault
contracts.summary: Sets aside funds for security and resilience-related protocol obligations.

contracts.name: CommunityVault
contracts.summary: Supports ecosystem/community allocations without mixing with proof settlement rails.

contracts.name: ProofSeedRegistry
contracts.summary: Records seed-level proof metadata used to initialize or identify proof objects.

contracts.name: LegacyAGIJobManagerRegistry
contracts.summary: Bridges legacy AGIJobManager lifecycle references into the GoalOS-native regime.

contracts.name: ReputationRegistry
contracts.summary: Records reputation updates arising from accepted work, reviewer history, and disputes.

contracts.name: ReferralRegistry
contracts.summary: Records referral and attribution links for ecosystem growth or contribution tracking.

contracts.name: ProofCardRegistry
contracts.summary: Mints or records proof-card style objects after successful review/signoff.

contracts.name: ProofCredentialRegistry
contracts.summary: Records credentials linked to proof acceptance and reviewer/worker identity.

contracts.name: JobRegistry
contracts.summary: Defines bounded jobs, reward terms, liability constraints, and release mechanics.

contracts.name: JobClaimBondManager
contracts.summary: Handles bonds associated with job claims and claimant accountability.

contracts.name: PremiumAccessRegistry
contracts.summary: Tracks premium/protocol access state without making public demos require an account.

contracts.name: ProofSubmissionRegistry
contracts.summary: Connects submitted proof to review, approval, credential issuance, and reward release paths.

contracts.name: ReviewerBondRegistry
contracts.summary: Models reviewer bonds, approvals, challenge windows, and slashing conditions.

contracts.name: TreasuryRouter
contracts.summary: Routes protocol fees and allocations across the vault family.

contracts.name: ProtocolConfigRegistry
contracts.summary: Stores protocol-level configuration parameters and guardrail values.

contracts.name: LaunchGateRegistry
contracts.summary: Represents stage/launch gates before sensitive activation paths can proceed.

contracts.name: DisputeRegistry
contracts.summary: Records disputes raised against signoffs, claims, credentials, or settlement decisions.

contracts.name: AppealRegistry
contracts.summary: Provides an appeal layer after disputed outcomes or adverse determinations.

contracts.name: SponsorRegistry
contracts.summary: Tracks sponsors that support work, reviewers, missions, or protocol participation.

contracts.name: BuilderProfileRegistry
contracts.summary: Records builder profiles so work histories can become inspectable over time.

contracts.name: CredentialRevocationRegistry
contracts.summary: Records revocation events so bad or superseded credentials do not remain authoritative.

contracts.name: AEPAgentRegistry
contracts.summary: Registers agent identities and their permitted participation boundaries.

contracts.name: AEPArtifactRegistry
contracts.summary: Records hashes and references for artifacts submitted as evidence.

contracts.name: AEPGoalOSCommitRegistry
contracts.summary: Records commitments to brief, success criteria, constraints, authority, and boundaries.

contracts.name: AEPRunCommitmentRegistry
contracts.summary: Records commitments for a particular execution run before outputs are accepted.

contracts.name: AEPProofLedger
contracts.summary: Maintains a ledger of proof events and state transitions.

contracts.name: AEPEvalRegistry
contracts.summary: Records evaluation outputs, baseline comparisons, and review-relevant checks.

contracts.name: AEPAttestationRegistry
contracts.summary: Records reviewer, evaluator, or authorized-party attestations.

contracts.name: AEPSelectionGate
contracts.summary: Controls when a candidate proof/work object can be promoted or selected.

contracts.name: AEPRolloutRouter
contracts.summary: Routes accepted work toward bounded rollout lanes after gate satisfaction.

contracts.name: AEPRollbackRegistry
contracts.summary: Records rollback duties and rollback-state evidence for governed releases.

contracts.name: AEPEvidenceDocketRegistry
contracts.summary: Records docket, claims matrix, public/private boundaries, cost ledger, and risk ledger hashes.

contracts.name: AEPProofBundleRegistry
contracts.summary: Records proof bundle identifiers and hash commitments tying evidence to acceptance.

contracts.name: AlphaWorkUnitLedger
contracts.summary: Tracks accepted work units that can inform reputation, reward, or future allocation.

contracts.name: MandateEpochRegistry
contracts.summary: Records mandate epochs so governance contexts and permissions are time-bounded.

contracts.name: AGIEthNamespaceRegistry
contracts.summary: Maintains Ethereum namespace references for AGI/GoalOS protocol objects.

contracts.name: AEPConformanceRegistry
contracts.summary: Records conformance status against AEP or GoalOS rules.

contracts.name: AEPClaimBoundaryRegistry
contracts.summary: Defines what a proof, credential, or Signoff is and is not allowed to claim.

contracts.name: AEPReplayRegistry
contracts.summary: Records replay commitments and independent replay evidence.

contracts.name: AEPCommitRevealValidationRegistry
contracts.summary: Supports commit/reveal validation patterns for challenge-resistant proof checks.

contracts.name: AEPEvaluatorStakingRegistry
contracts.summary: Models evaluator stakes that can secure review and challenge processes.

contracts.name: AEPSlashingCourt
contracts.summary: Handles evidence-backed slashing cases for evaluator or reviewer misconduct.

contracts.name: AEPRewardVault
contracts.summary: Pays or records rewards associated with proof bundles and accepted work units.

contracts.name: AEPChronicleRegistry
contracts.summary: Records accepted proof/work events as institutional memory.

contracts.name: AEPFalsificationRegistry
contracts.summary: Records falsification attempts, challenge evidence, and counter-claims.

boundary.default: browser-local deterministic planning, no external AI call
boundary.allows: a local text box for intent-to-mission planning
